text: [Persuasion 2] Any idea who's behind the leaks?
[Persuasion 3] What do you think is really going on?
[Persuasion] Whatever you saw, it's connected to the pirate attacks. People are dying on those convoy routes.
[Persuasion] People are being killed with military weapons that shouldn't exist. Your pension won't mean much if the whole sector falls apart.
[Persuasion] I need copies of those schematics. Everything you have on Project Convergence.
[Persuasion] Give me the data. Schematics, authorization codes, everything. I'll make sure the right people see it.
